name: ALTERITY THERAPEUT.ADR/60
summary: Alterity Therapeutics Ltd. ADR represents American Depositary Receipts of Alterity Therapeutics Limited, an Australian pharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for neurodegenerative diseases, particularly Parkinson's disease. They are developing drugs aimed at treating diseases associated with the accumulation of certain proteins in the brain. The company is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
